aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
比特币短期走势呈现震荡整理。
【关键位置】
当前支撑位为70,000美元，阻力位为75,000美元。
【走势推演】
若跌破支撑位，可能会继续下跌；若突破阻力位，可能会继续上涨。
【一句提醒】
投资者应密切关注市场走势，谨慎操作。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's short-term trend is consolidating.
[Key Drivers]
Current support level is $70,000, resistance level is $75,000.
[Outlook]
If it breaks through the support level, it may continue to decline; if it breaks through the resistance level, it may continue to rise.
[Reminder]
Investors should closely monitor market trends and operate cautiously.
